# EXECUTIVE ASHIYA

> EXECUTIVE ASHIYA（エグゼクティブ芦屋）は、兵庫県芦屋市を拠点とした完全出張型のヘルスケアコンシェルジュサービスです。パーソナルトレーニング・栄養設計・医療連携・メンタルケアを包括的に提供し、経営者・エグゼクティブ・芸能関係者など、プライバシーと品質を重視するクライアントの健康管理を専属チームがサポートします。全スタッフがNDA（秘密保持契約）を締結しています。

EXECUTIVE ASHIYA is a luxury, fully mobile healthcare concierge service based in Ashiya, Hyogo, Japan. We provide comprehensive health management — personal training, nutrition planning, medical coordination, and mental wellness — exclusively through private home/office visits. Our clients include business executives, entertainment professionals, and Takarazuka Revue performers. All staff are bound by strict NDAs.

## Services

- [Personal Training](https://executive-ashiya.com/#services): 完全出張パーソナルトレーニング — Certified trainers visit your home or office for fully customized one-on-one sessions based on your body data and goals.
- [Health Consulting](https://executive-ashiya.com/#services): 包括的ヘルスコンサルティング — Regular body composition measurements, vital checks, and continuous health monitoring by your dedicated health concierge.
- [Nutrition & Supplements](https://executive-ashiya.com/#services): 栄養設計・オーダーメイドサプリメント — Personalized nutrition strategies based on blood data and constitution, from meal planning to custom supplement formulation.
- [Medical Network](https://executive-ashiya.com/#services): 医療機関・整骨院提携ネットワーク — Coordination with trusted medical institutions, osteopathic clinics, and acupuncture clinics for comprehensive team-based health support.
- [Recovery & Conditioning](https://executive-ashiya.com/#services): リカバリー・コンディショニング — Integrated stretching, body care, and conditioning to prevent fatigue buildup and maintain peak performance.
- [Stress Management](https://executive-ashiya.com/#services): ストレスマネジメント・メンタルウェルネス — Breathing techniques, mindfulness, and lifestyle optimization for executives dealing with high mental and physical demands.

## Track Record

- [Proven Results](https://executive-ashiya.com/#track-record): 5,000+ total clients, 92% retention rate. Client categories include entertainment professionals, Takarazuka Revue performers, business executives, and medical professionals. Trainer acceptance rate: 0.3%.

## How to Join

- [Flow](https://executive-ashiya.com/#how-to-join): 完全紹介制＋特別審査枠。ご紹介 or お問い合わせ → 個別ヒアリング → ご提案 → ご契約。招待状をお持ちの方はヒアリングからスタート。

## FAQ

- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://executive-ashiya.com/#faq): Common questions answered about the healthcare concierge concept, medical coordination, service areas, contract terms, privacy/NDA, and family/partner sessions.

## News

- [Latest Information](https://executive-ashiya.com/#news): Service announcements and columns on executive health investment, private training, and medical network partnerships.

## Contact

- [Get In Touch](https://executive-ashiya.com/#contact): Contact form for inquiries. Responses within 1-2 business days.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://executive-ashiya.com/privacy.html): プライバシーポリシー — How we collect, use, and protect personal information.
- [Commercial Transactions Act](https://executive-ashiya.com/tokushoho.html): 特定商取引法に基づく表記 — Legal business information required under Japanese law.

## Optional

- [Members Area](https://executive-ashiya.com/#members): Password-protected pricing and plan details (PLATINUM / EXECUTIVE tiers, available to approved members only).
